title: Easy NPC - Epic Fight
description: Combine Easy NPCs and Epic Fight seamlessly for an enhanced Minecraft experience! This integration mod effortlessly merges intricate fighting styles and engaging dialogues, enabling you to create dynamic NPCs with ease.
body:
# Easy NPC: Epic-Fight Integration

[![Easy NPC - Epic Fight Downloads](http://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/full_957625_downloads.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/easy-npc-epic-fight)
[![Easy NPC - Epic Fight Versions](http://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/versions/Minecraft_957625_all.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/easy-npc-epic-fight)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3MlgtYPG/df3ee635ed23081ff7a736c7125d480e3c5f121c_96.webp)

> Legacy add-on: Since Easy NPC 6.4.x, Epic Fight support is built in.  
> This integration mod is only required for older Easy NPC versions.

## Overview

This project provides Epic Fight integration for legacy versions of [Easy NPC][easy_npc].

For current Easy NPC versions, no separate integration mod is needed anymore. Built-in Epic Fight support is included directly in Easy NPC since version 6.4.x.

If you are using Easy NPC 6.4.x or newer, install Easy NPC together with [Epic Fight][epic_fight] only and do not use this add-on.

## When is this mod needed?

Use this integration mod only if you are running an older Easy NPC version that does not yet include built-in Epic Fight support.

If you are using the latest supported Easy NPC version, this mod is no longer needed.

## Features for legacy versions

For older Easy NPC releases, this integration mod adds compatibility with Epic Fight and allows NPCs to work with parts of Epic Fight's combat system.

This includes support for:
- Epic Fight combat behavior
- Epic Fight animations
- Integration with supported Epic Fight combat mechanics

## Restrictions

Because of the custom Epic Fight models, some limitations apply:

- Pose configuration is not supported for Epic Fight models
- NPCs will always use the Epic Fight pose
- Scaling is not supported
- Not all models are supported out of the box

Most other configuration options remain usable.

## Animation and Custom Weapons

Please check the [Epic Fight documentation][epic_fight_wiki] for more information about custom animations, weapons, and data pack support.

This project is only an integration mod for older versions and does not provide a complete animation set for every use case.

Example NPC configuration used by this integration mod can be found under:

`/Forge/src/main/resources/data/easy_npc_epic_fight/epicfight_mobpatch/`

## Requirements

| Version | [Easy NPC Mod][easy_npc] | [Epic Fight Mod][epic_fight] |
|---------|--------------------------|------------------------------|
| 1.0.0   | 1.x                      | 18.5.19                      |
| 3.0.0   | > 3.7.2 and < 4.x        | 18.5.19                      |
| 4.0.0   | > 4.3.3 and < 5.x        | 18.5.24                      |

## Documentation

Please check the [Easy NPC Wiki][easy_npc_wiki] for current documentation and integration details.

[easy_npc]: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/easy-npc
[easy_npc_wiki]: https://github.com/MarkusBordihn/BOs-Easy-NPC/wiki
[epic_fight]: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-fight-mod
[epic_fight_wiki]: https://epicfight-docs.readthedocs.io/Guides/page1/
